policy_description: This step writes design contracts for future sample preparation execution.
Raw CIF/mmCIF is not read in this design gate.
struct_conn and atom_site parsing are reserved for the next execution smoke.
The input manifest is not a sample index.
The input manifest is not a final dataset.
The input manifest is not a training sample.
A sample preparation execution smoke is required next.
No split or leakage matrix is written.
Feature semantics audit remains required before training.
Leakage/split design remains required before training.
The canonical five masks are preserved.
Design artifacts must not be used for training.
